name: Get Window Direct Targetting for National Campaigns

content.query:
SELECT 
[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,[Productid]
,[EntryDate]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_TCT_ClientLeads]
 WHERE
 EntryDate >= '2023-01-01'
 and Sold = 0
  and ClientID not in 
 (
     'gn07db','i417db','f199db','yy72db','a5b5db','zz99db'
 )
 and productid IN
 (
'Win',
'Windows',
'W/D',
'window',
'_WIN',
'Win/Sid',
'New Window',
'Win & Door',
'Win/PD',
'LEG Win ',
'W&D',
'WinDr',
'Windows - ',
'WD',
'Wind',
'Winstar',
'Windows Re',
'Sid/Win',
'WinComp',
'Window Rep',
'Win>PatDor',
'Retail Win',
'Win Combo',
'Windows, S',
'{{Win}}',
'Patio Wind',
'Egress Win',
'Wind/Sid',
'Comm Wind',
'StWin',
'WinNI',
'Repl Win',
'win-BAY',
'Windows, R',
'ESwing',
'Ins (Win)',
'Ins. Wind',
'Win Roof',
'Windows, T',
'Windows,So',
'win-polari',
'_V Win',
'AHI Window',
'CCWin',
'ForWin',
'WinDoor',
'Window Ins',
'Windows &',
'Windows, B',
'WNDW'
 )
